formula_or_rule: Naegele's rule: EDD = first day of the last menstrual period (LMP) + 280 days (40 weeks). Equivalently: LMP + 1 year - 3 months + 7 days.

condition_rules.note: if a first-trimester ultrasound gestational age is given instead of LMP, back-calculate an effective LMP from the ultrasound date and gestational age, then apply the same +280 days
